content.text: We have assigned your request HEAL-33765 to an appropriate Help Desk team member. They will reach out to you shortly with an update.
Issue `HEAL-33765` has been assigned to me. I'm taking a look now and will keep you updated as I make progress.
Let me know if there's any additional context that might help.
Log in as one of the Global service members
Navigate to a Patient Account record
Attempt to edit the "Main Practitioner" field on the Account
Permission Set Lab_Providers_C_R_E was missing FLS for Account.Main_Practitioner__c
Validated field access for all three users. All users confirmed read/write access to Main Practitioner field in Sandbox.
